mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.project_id AS "projectId", a.name, a.arrival_at AS "arrivalAt", a.remark, a.attachments, a.created_by AS "createdBy", a.created_at AS "createdAt", a.updated_by AS "updatedBy", a.updated_at AS "updatedAt", p.code AS "projectCode", p.name AS "projectName", creator.name AS "createdByName" FROM material_arrival a LEFT JOIN project p ON p.id = a.project_id LEFT JOIN sys_account creator ON creator.id = a.created_by WHERE a.id = #{id}
